_observed: The Moonbreon false deal (John, 2026-06-25). The /deals board flagged 'Umbreon VMAX 215/203 · Near Mint · 31% below sold' but the listing it pointed to was a GBP-denominated, Lightly Played, UK card via the Global Shipping Program. The signal compared an LP/UK/GBP listing against the US/NM/USD sold reference. Two like-for-like failures: (1) CURRENCY — a £1,000 GBP ask compared numerically against a USD average (ADR-069 currency gate); (2) CONDITION — Lightly Played compared against the Near Mint reference (the ADR-057 aspect gate matches LP, not NM). Either gate alone must yield UNKNOWN (no deal).
title: Pokemon Umbreon VMAX Alt Art 215/203 Evolving Skies
